title: Terrain Explorer
description: WebGL procedural terrain — sculpt mountains, switch biomes, fly through, and export your landscape.
concept: A real-time 3D terrain generator powered by WebGL and fractional Brownian motion noise. Dial in octaves, scale, roughness, height and sea level to shape mountains, deserts, volcanoes or arctic tundra. Switch between Orbit, Fly (WASD) and Cinematic camera modes, pick from 5 biome palettes with matching water colors and sky, then export your landscape as a PNG.
features: 5 biome palettes: Alpine, Desert, Forest, Lava, Arctic
6 real-time terrain sliders (octaves, scale, roughness, height, sea level, light angle)
3 camera modes: Orbit drag, Fly (WASD + drag-look), Cinematic auto-orbit
Animated water plane with specular shimmer

interaction.mouse: Left-drag to orbit / look; right-drag to zoom in orbit mode
interaction.scroll: Scroll wheel to zoom in orbit mode
interaction.touch: Touch-drag to orbit; pinch to zoom
interaction.keyboard: WASD / arrow keys to fly in Fly mode
